summary.intent: Fix the reasoning effort toggle button width, which was too wide relative to its short text content.
summary.outcome: Overrode the inherited max-width and removed justify-content: space-between on the reasoning combo button in input.css to make it compact, then committed and pushed the fix.

repo: The reasoning combo button inherits .model-combo-btn styles including max-width: 220px and justify-content: space-between, which are designed for long model names and cause width/layout issues for shorter labels.

code.finding: The .model-combo-btn class sets max-width: 220px and justify-content: space-between; the reasoning toggle button needs its own override to constrain width and use compact content alignment.

workflow: CSS changes require a Tailwind rebuild step after editing input.css before the changes take effect.

friction: The reasoning combo button inherited overly broad styles from .model-combo-btn, requiring a targeted override rather than being sized correctly out of the box.
